Availability Calendar

Mark your available and unavailable dates so customers know when to book you

{{ wd }}

@for (blank of [].constructor(getFirstDayOfWeek()); track $index) {
} @for (day of days(); track day.date) {
{{ day.date.split('-')[2] }} @if (day.status === 'booked') {
Booked
} @else if (day.status === 'blocked') {

Available

This Month Summary
{{ stats.available }}Available
{{ stats.booked }}Booked
{{ stats.blocked }}Blocked
How to use
  • Click a day to toggle it between Available and Blocked
  • Booked dates cannot be changed (already booked by a customer)
  • Customers can see your availability before requesting a booking
